attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT     
,BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD              
,FIXED_ASSET_NUM               
,DV_ASSET_ACCOUNT_CD           
,CIP_ACCOUNT_CD                
,EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_CD            
,SERIAL_NUM                    
,FA_TAG_NUM                    
,MODEL_NUM                     
,ASSET_DESCR                   
,ASSET_ACQUISITION_DT          
,ASSET_DEPRECIATION_START_DT   
,ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT    
,INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE       
,ASST_DEPRECIABL_LIFE_MTH_CNT  
,DV_LIFE_YR_MNT                
,ORIGINAL_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,ORIGINAL_COST_USD_AMT         
,BOOKS_CURRENT_COST            
,BOOKS_USD_COST                
,BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD            
,REMAINING_LIFE_MONTHS_CNT     
,RU_INTERNAL_EQPMNT_ASSET_QTY  
,FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD        
,TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME     
,FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME   
,CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,DV_CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT       
,MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT             
,DV_USD_MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT      
,YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNC_AMT       
,DV_YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_USD_AMT     
,DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,USD_DEPRN_RESERVE_USD_AMT     
,DV_FUNCTIONAL_NET_BOOK_VAL_AMT
,DV_NET_BOOK_VAL_USD_AMT 
, 'ELIMINATION' AS DV_DEPRECIATION_TYPE  
FROM    $$STGDB.WI_MT_FIXED_ASSET_WITH_ELM EMFAD
where not exists 
(  
select 1 from  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIXED_ASSET_WITH_DEPRN MFAD
WHERE 
MFAD.BK_COMPANY_CD = EMFAD.BK_COMPANY_CD 
AND MFAD.FIXED_ASSET_NUM = EMFAD.FIXED_ASSET_NUM  
AND MFAD.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD = EMFAD.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
AND MFAD.DV_DEPRECIATION_TYPE = 'ELIMINATION'
)

SELECT  
 (NFAC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ NFAC.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT    AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT     
 ,NFAC.BK_COMPANY_CD 
 ,NFAC.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD 
 ,NFAC.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM   
 ,(CASE WHEN NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_TYPE_CD ='CIP' THEN GLACIP.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ELSE GLAST.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE END ) AS DV_ASSET_ACCOUNT_CD
 ,GLACIP.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS CIP_ACCOUNT_CD
 ,GLEXP.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_CD
 ,NFA.SERIAL_NUM                    
 ,NFA.FA_TAG_NUM                    
 ,NFA.MODEL_NUM                     
 ,NFA.ASSET_DESCR                   
 ,NFA.ASSET_ACQUISITION_DT          
 ,NFA.ASSET_DEPRECIATION_START_DT   
 ,NFA.ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT    
 ,NFA.INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE       
 ,NFA.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT  
 ,(NFA.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT/12 )||'.'|| TRIM(CAST ( NFA.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT - (12 * ( NFA.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT/12)) AS INTEGER)) AS DV_LIFE_YR_MNT                
 ,COALESCE(NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST,0 )  
 ,COALESCE(NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST,0)        
 ,COALESCE(NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST,0 )    AS BOOKS_CURRENT_COST            
 ,COALESCE(NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST,0)        AS BOOKS_USD_COST                
 ,NFA.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD            
 ,NFA.REMAINING_LIFE_MONTHS_CNT     
 ,NFA.RU_INTERNAL_EQPMNT_ASSET_QTY  
 ,NFAC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD        
 ,'UNKNOWN'
 ,'UNKNOWN'
 ,COALESCE (NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST,0 ) AS CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
 ,COALESCE (NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST,0) AS DV_CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT
 ,COALESCE (NF4.ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0)   AS MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT
 ,COALESCE (NF4.ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT,0 )  AS DV_USD_MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT      
 ,COALESCE (NF3.DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0 ) AS YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNC_AMT
 ,COALESCE (NF3.DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT,0  )       AS DV_YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_USD_AMT  
 ,COALESCE (NF3.DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,0 )AS DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
 ,COALESCE (NF3.DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT,0 ) AS USD_DEPRN_RESERVE_USD_AMT  
 ,COALESCE ((NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST- NF3.DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT),0) AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_NET_BOOK_VAL_AMT
 ,COALESCE ((NF5.DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST- NF3.DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT),0)  AS DV_NET_BOOK_VAL_USD_AMT 
   FROM     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST  NFAC
 INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
 ON NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = NFAC.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
    AND NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NFAC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
     AND NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD = NFAC.BK_COMPANY_CD 
 INNER JOIN      $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLAST 
    ON  GLAST.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=  NFA.ASSET_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY       
    INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLEXP 
            ON GLEXP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=  NFAC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY       
            INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLACIP
           ON GLACIP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=  NFA.CIP_TARGET_ASSET_GL_ACCT_KEY
    INNER JOIN  ( SEL BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM, MIN ((BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT ) YEAR_MTH
    FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST 
    GROUP BY 1)NF
    ON NF.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM=NFAC.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
 AND NF.YEAR_MTH=FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
 INNER JOIN (
 ( SEL NF1.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,YEAR_MTH,SUM(NF2.DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) AS DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,SUM(NF2.DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT) AS DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT FROM 
                              (SEL BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM, MAX ((BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT ) YEAR_MTH
                                                 FROM    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST 
                                                 GROUP BY 1)NF1
                              INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST NF2
                              ON NF1.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM=NF2.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
                              AND NF1.YEAR_MTH=(NF2.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+NF2. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT 
                              GROUP BY 1,2
                             ) NF3
 )
 ON
 NF.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM =NF3.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
 LEFT JOIN (
 ( SEL NF1.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,YEAR_MTH,SUM(NF2.ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) AS ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 SUM(NF2.ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT) AS ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT FROM 
                              (SEL BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM, MAX ((BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT ) YEAR_MTH 
                               FROM    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST 
             WHERE BK_ASSET_EVENT_LIFE_CYCLE_CD = 'DEPRECIATION'
                                                 GROUP BY 1)NF1
                              INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST NF2
                              ON NF1.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM=NF2.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
                              AND NF1.YEAR_MTH=(NF2.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+NF2. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT 
                              GROUP BY 1,2
                             ) NF4
 )
 ON
 NF.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM =NF4.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
 LEFT JOIN (
 ( SEL NF1.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,YEAR_MTH_MIN,
 SUM(NF2.DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST) AS DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST,
 SUM(NF2.DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST) AS DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST 
  FROM 
                              (SEL BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM, MIN ((BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT ) YEAR_MTH_MIN 
                               FROM    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST 
             WHERE BK_ASSET_EVENT_LIFE_CYCLE_CD = 'DEPRECIATION'
                                                 GROUP BY 1)NF1
                              INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_MNTLY_ELMTN_COST NF2
                              ON NF1.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM=NF2.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
                              AND NF1.YEAR_MTH_MIN=(NF2.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+NF2. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT 
                              GROUP BY 1,2
                             ) NF5
 )
 ON
 NF.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM =NF5.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
 INNER JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
 ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (NFAC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100)+ NFAC.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
 WHERE   FISCAL_YEAR_AGE < 3 AND  RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT >=201608
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY NFAC.BK_COMPANY_CD , NFAC.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM , NFA.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD ORDER BY NFAC.BK_COMPANY_CD , NFAC.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM , NFA.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD DESC )=1
